name: testRigor
description: testRigor — NLP-based test automation platform for writing end-to-end tests in plain English without code.

seo.title: testRigor — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: testRigor: testRigor — NLP-based test automation platform for writing end-to-end tests in plain English without code.

when_to_use: Writing E2E tests in plain English without selectors or code
Auto-generating regression test suites from user story descriptions
Running AI-maintained tests that self-repair after UI updates
Scaling QA coverage for Salesforce and web apps without code

pros: Covers web, mobile and API flows
review.verdict: Effective if your QA team cannot code, but engineering-heavy shops still get more value from Playwright plus AI.
review.best_for: QA teams without strong coding skills who want broad coverage fast
review.not_for: Mature engineering orgs already invested in Playwright or Cypress
